title: Lazy Sunday Gyro
description: A delicious and easy-to-make gyro recipe perfect for a relaxing Sunday afternoon. The combination of flavors and textures will transport you to the Mediterranean.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean Skewers
ingredients.notes: Cherry tomatoes, olives, and bell peppers

instructions: Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the Mediterranean skewers onto the Lazy Sunday Wrap.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until lightly charred.
In a small bowl, mix together the yogurt and Tzatziki Sauce.
Assemble the gyro by placing the grilled skewers onto the Lazy Sunday Wrap, followed by a dollop of yogurt sauce.
